input.content: Would you be able to increase my current fuel reserve to twice its size?
Since we've topped up the fuel, let's ignite the engine and assess the battery's condition for our journey.

input.output: {"error": "All doors must be locked before starting the engine. Here are the unlocked doors: driver, passenger, rear_left, rear_right"}
{"error": "Brake pedal needs to be pressed when starting the engine."}

input.content: Verify the tire pressure to guarantee they're accurately inflated for our lengthy expedition.
I need to inform my friend about the road trip itinerary; please dispatch them a note saying 'Road trip itinerary update.'. If that helps, my user id is 'USR005'.

tools.name: add_contact
tools.description: This tool belongs to the Message API, which is used to manage user interactions in a workspace. Tool description: Add a contact to the workspace. Note that the provided function is in Python 3 syntax.

user_name.description: User name of contact to be added.

added_status.description: True if the contact was added successfully, False otherwise.

user_id.description: User ID of the added contact.

message.description: A message describing the result of the addition attempt.

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: This tool belongs to the Message API, which is used to manage user interactions in a workspace. Tool description: Delete the latest message sent to a receiver. Note that the provided function is in Python 3 syntax.

deleted_status.description: True if the message was deleted successfully, False otherwise.

receiver_id.description: ID of the receiver of the deleted message.

message.description: A message describing the result of the deletion attempt.

tools.name: adjustClimateControl

tools.name: check_tire_pressure

healthy_tire_pressure.description: True if the tire pressure is healthy, False otherwise.

tools.name: displayCarStatus

driver.description: The status of the driver door. [Enum]: ["locked", "unlocked"]

passenger.description: The status of the passenger door. [Enum]: ["locked", "unlocked"]

rear_left.description: The status of the rear left door. [Enum]: ["locked", "unlocked"]

rear_right.description: The status of the rear right door. [Enum]: ["locked", "unlocked"]

currentACTemperature.description: [Optional] The current temperature set in degree Celsius.

fanSpeed.description: [Optional] The fan speed set from 0 to 100.

parkingBrakeForce.description: [Optional] The force applied to the brake in Newtons.

brakePedalStatus.description: [Optional] The status of the brake pedal. [Enum]: ["pressed", "released"]

brakePedalForce.description: [Optional] The force applied to the brake pedal in Newtons.

messages.content:
[Golden Rule Compiler]
- For tool-enabled turns, emit the next tool call instead of explanatory prose whenever the next action is already supported by the available tools.
- Do not ask for values that are already explicit in prior user turns, tool outputs, or the current working state.
- Before using path-sensitive tools, ground the current working directory and existing file or directory names from prior tool outputs instead of assuming the root directory.
- When emitting tool calls, keep assistant content empty and avoid adding a free-form status summary in the same message.
- Known explicit context values you can reuse exactly if relevant: Road trip itinerary update., USR005, Michael, Sarah, David, Emma, USR007
- When tools are available and the current request already contains enough local evidence to continue, emit the next tool call instead of ending the turn with explanatory prose.
- Do not end a tool-enabled turn with prose-only status updates when the next action can be grounded from the current request, prior explicit literals, or prior tool outputs.
- Reuse explicit file names, paths, identifiers, or quoted literals already present in the request context before asking for clarification or stopping.
- Use prior tool outputs as grounding for the next tool call instead of switching into natural-language explanation.
Would you be able to increase my current fuel reserve to twice its size?
Since we've topped up the fuel, let's ignite the engine and assess the battery's condition for our journey.
{"error": "All doors must be locked before starting the engine. Here are the unlocked doors: driver, passenger, rear_left, rear_right"}
{"error": "Brake pedal needs to be pressed when starting the engine."}
Verify the tire pressure to guarantee they're accurately inflated for our lengthy expedition.
I need to inform my friend about the road trip itinerary; please dispatch them a note saying 'Road trip itinerary update.'. If that helps, my user id is 'USR005'.
